Who We Are

Built on Expertise,
Driven by Quality

Sri Kaviya Industries is a trusted name in industrial solutions, serving clients across Tamil Nadu for over 20 years. We specialize in electrical & electronics, mechanical engineering, motor rewinding, and comprehensive control panel solutions.

  • ISO-standard quality motor rewinding (AC & DC)
  • State-of-the-art welding facility
  • Expert team of certified engineers & technicians
  • End-to-end control panel design & supply
  • Sheet metal & press shop for volume production
  • Trusted by automobile & textile industries in Tamil Nadu
MSME Registered Quality Assured
